note: As-built (implement r1): the per-session attach/kill pickers + the changelog live-session dot, over the same contract.Repo (presentation/interaction only). Shipped design matches the accepted intended design 1:1 - attachFeature branches 0/1/>=2, killDrill 1 vs >=2, changelogRow gains a hasSession dot; both pickers bind through the heap-stable *formBinding.selected.
